CalloutManifest.Name: Paranormal Callouts
CalloutManifest.Author: Dem0n1556
CalloutManifest.Description: A collection of supernatural and paranormal-themed callouts for LSPDFR

Callout.Name: The Vanishing Bride
Callout.Description: A driver reports nearly hitting a woman in a wedding dress on the roadside. When he stops to help, she vanishes.

Callout.Name: Bigfoot Sighting
Callout.Description: A hiker reports seeing a large, hairy creature matching the description of Bigfoot in the surrounding wilderness.

Callout.Name: Sandy Shores Screams
Callout.Description: Anonymous reports of disturbing screams coming from the abandoned Sandy Shores hotel. Investigate the source.
